subject: Re: NYT
body:
Hi Jeff

About time for our actions to turn into theatre and movie pieces.
Shall we talk? Any news from BC/AdR?

Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone
body_html:

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Re: NYT
body:
Hi Jeff

I'm in Serengeti, Tanzania
No real communication. Cannot open the NYT article. But to judge from the article's title they are at least exaggerating if not totally wrong. This attack will not change strategy in a major way on either side. It will however raise respect for DJT in Moscow and few other capitals. That's not necessarily bad, if the WH won't read this change as a precedent which calls to be repeated too often.

Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone
